name: Kankuro (S)
description: In the last couple years Kankuro(s) has become a Jounin and has created a new puppet. He is now able to harness three puppets at once and is a more versatile combatant.

skills.name: Kuroari Trap
skills.description: Kankuro traps one enemy for 1 turn. If that enemy uses a new harmful skill, they will be countered and receive 15 additional damage from 'Karasu Knives'. This skill is invisible.

skills.name: Karasu Knives
skills.description: Kankuro assaults one enemy with poisoned knives, dealing 25 damage to them and that enemy will take 10 affliction damage the following turn*. For 1 turn, this skill will be replaced by 'Karasu: Finishing Knive'.

skills.name: Sanshouo Shield
skills.description: Kankuro uses Sanshouo to block enemy attacks. For 3 turns, Kankuro and his allies gain 5 points of damage reduction and are immune to affliction damage. During this time, this skill will be replaced by 'Salamander Puppet'. This skill ends if Kankuro dies.

skills.name: Puppet Distraction
skills.description: This skill makes Kankuro (S) invulnerable for 1 turn.

skills.name: Karasu: Finishing Knive
skills.description: This skill deals 20 piercing damage to one enemy.

skills.name: Salamander Puppet
skills.description: Kankuro protects himself or an ally for 1 turn, that ally will gain 20 points of unpierceable damage reduction.
